appliedUpdates.description: Updated .factory/library/triton-client-api.md to document edge cases for timeout parsing: negative values clamped to 0, empty/non-numeric strings fall back to default, and float("inf") accepted as no-timeout value.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: The backend-worker skill's TDD-first step could note that purely additive test coverage features (where behavior is already correct and the goal is only to add missing regression tests) do not require forcing a failing test first. The current wording assumes every feature involves a behavior change.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature triton-timeout-edge-case-tests deviated from TDD-first because the implementation was already correct; the feature only added missing regression coverage and a code comment. Worker noted this justified deviation in handoff.skillFeedback.
